mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (member_id, total_amount, point_used, payment_amount, status, ordered_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{totalAmount}, #{pointUsed}, #{paymentAmount}, 'ORDERED', NOW())
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, quantity, price) VALUES (#{param1}, #{param2}, #{param3}, #{param4})
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, total_amount, point_used, payment_amount, status, ordered_at FROM orders WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY ordered_at DESC
SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, p.name AS product_name, oi.quantity, oi.price FROM order_item oi JOIN product p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
